title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCVIII. Games.
content:
Number number nine, this hoop's mine;
        Number number ten, take it back again.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCVIII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
